{{Infobox group
| name = Ghost Division
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Ghost Division]] is one of the [[Abidan]] divisions.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Ghost Division]] is a division of the [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Ghost Division]] builds and maintains the laws of reality.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] mentioned the [[Ghost Division]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
